description: Due to recent data protection regulations, implement a GDPR-compliant Privacy Policy page for the Socioboard PHP frontend located at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/. Create a GET route for /privacy that returns a view named privacy containing the text from /home/ga/Documents/privacy_policy.txt. Additionally, include a link to this policy on the main login page using the exact HTML: Privacy Policy. Ensure the new route and view are active and accessible at http://localhost/privacy.
